scope.plan: (none; one-time repository infrastructure change per the user's brief on 2026-07-11)
in_scope: Rename the default branch from master to main; main is created at the M2.5 closeout commit (the latest stable, releasable state of the product).

Re-key all Git-branch references to the word master in the working tree (13 markdown files; 1 JSON file). The phrase 'master delivery plan' (the file master-delivery-plan.md) is preserved; the Git branch is what changed, not the file name.

Adopt the permanent branching strategy (12 rules; one canonical location at .ai/workflows/branching-strategy.md; no duplication). Update CONTRIBUTING.md § 3 and .ai/README.md to reference the new strategy instead of restating branch-name conventions.
Add the GitHub remote at https://github.com/maestroohk/ai-engineering-platform.git as 'origin'. Do not push (per the brief and the command protocol: push requires explicit user authorisation).
Tag the M2.5 closeout commit as m2.5 (the first milestone tag; per rule 9 of the new branching strategy, every milestone receives a milestone tag).

Verify the Git identity: the existing authenticated identity (Kasozi Henry <20888838+maestroohk@users.noreply.github.com>) is the host's user, not a Claude-specific identity. No Claude identity to remove. The repository inherits the host's identity.
Single coherent commit on main: chore(repo): adopt main as the default branch and document the branching strategy.
out_of_scope: Renaming legacy feature branches (the M0.5 → M2.5 branches use the older feature/<milestone>-<short-kebab> naming; they are preserved as historical record per the strategy's § 6).
Pushing to the remote (no push in this session; the user controls merges and pushes per the command protocol).

Renaming the file master-delivery-plan.md (the file is a delivery artefact, not a Git branch; renaming the file would cascade into many references and is out of scope for this one-time infrastructure change).
M2.6 or any other M2/M3 work (per the Progressive Coding Rule: one task per session; the M2.5 closeout is the previous session's work, and the next session is M2.6).

session_notes: Repository infrastructure session (2026-07-11). The user's brief was to (1) rename the default branch from master to main, (2) inspect the Git identity (no Claude identity was present; the host's authenticated identity is Kasozi Henry <20888838+maestroohk@users.noreply.github.com>), (3) add the GitHub remote at https://github.com/maestroohk/ai-engineering-platform.git as origin (no push), and (4) adopt a permanent branching strategy (12 rules; one canonical location; no duplication). The session executes the brief in the order: (a) commit the master→main re-keyings on the M2.5 feature branch (the doc/state changes ride on the existing branch); (b) create main at the M2.5 feature branch's tip (which carries the M2.5 closeout + the re-keying); (c) switch to main; (d) write the canonical branching strategy at .ai/workflows/branching-strategy.md; (e) update CONTRIBUTING.md § 3 and .ai/README.md to reference the strategy (the conflicting branch-name conventions in CONTRIBUTING.md are removed); (f) add the GitHub remote; (g) tag the M2.5 closeout as m2.5 (the first milestone tag); (h) delete the legacy master branch; (i) create the single coherent commit on main. The session follows the Progressive Coding Rule: one task per session; stop after the coherent commit. Push is skipped (no push in this session; the user controls pushes per the command protocol).
